task.name: Performance Review Task
task.objective: Review code for performance issues and optimization opportunities

critical.mandate: Check for N+1 queries and inefficient database access
Identify blocking operations and memory leaks
Flag large payloads and unoptimized loops

step.title: Scope
step.action: Ask user for code to review

step.title: Baseline Metrics
step.action: Search for previous performance review reports in {test_artifacts}/performance-review-*.md
If a previous report exists: extract baseline metrics (response times, query counts, memory usage, payload sizes) to use as comparison benchmarks

If no previous report exists: establish initial baseline by documenting current observable performance characteristics (endpoint response times, database query counts per operation, memory footprint, payload sizes) — label these as "Initial Baseline"
Record baseline metrics for comparison in the final report

step.title: Database Performance
step.action: Identify missing indexes and inefficient queries

step.title: Runtime Performance
step.action: Identify blocking operations and synchronous bottlenecks
Check for memory leaks, large allocations
Flag unoptimized loops and redundant computations

step.title: Network and Payload
step.action: Check for large payloads, missing pagination
Identify unnecessary API calls or round trips

step.title: Report
step.template-output: Generate performance review report with: - Findings by category (database, runtime, network/payload), severity levels, impact estimates, and fix suggestions - Baseline Comparison section: if previous report exists, show before/after metrics for each category; if first run, show "Initial Baseline Established" with current metrics recorded for future comparison

output.format: Markdown performance findings with severity and impact
